verdict_en: 3 engines need inspection first — units 81, 34, 35 (predicted RUL ≤10 cycles).
verdict_zh: 有 3 台发动机需要优先检查——81, 34, 35 号（预测剩余寿命 ≤10 周期）。

signals.text_en: Units 81, 34, 35 sit at predicted RUL 6.6 / 7.1 / 9.8 cycles — the 3 closest to end-of-life (≤10 cycles).
signals.text_zh: 81, 34, 35 号机组预测剩余寿命 6.6 / 7.1 / 9.8 个周期，是最接近报废的 3 台（≤10 周期）。

signals.text_en: 18 engines are in the high-risk band overall — schedule the rest this cycle after the first inspections.
signals.text_zh: 整机队共有 18 台落在高风险区间——先查最急的，其余本周期内排上。

signals.text_en: Point estimates, typically off by about ±18 cycles and widest near end-of-life, where the model tends to read optimistic — use for triage ordering, not exact timing.
signals.text_zh: 这些都是点估计，误差大约 ±18 个周期，越接近寿命末端越大，而且模型这时往往偏乐观——只用来排优先级，别当作精确的剩余时间。

actions.label_zh: 为 81, 34, 35 号机组安排检查
actions.consequence_en: Export = draft work orders only, never commands. No maintenance is actuated; a human still approves each work order.
actions.consequence_zh: 导出的只是工单草稿，绝不是执行指令。不会触发任何维护动作，每张工单仍需人工批准。

actions.consequence_en: Units stay flagged; no work order is drafted.
actions.consequence_zh: 机组仍保持标记；不生成任何工单。

actions.label_zh: 查看 81 号机组的证据
actions.consequence_en: Opens the teaching-mode evidence viewer; changes nothing.
actions.consequence_zh: 打开教学模式的证据查看器；不改变任何状态。
